name: Meterpreter or Cobalt Strike Getsystem Service Installation - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Teymur Kheirkhabarov, Ecco, Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Meterpreter or Cobalt Strike Getsystem Service Installation - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects the use of getsystem Meterpreter/Cobalt Strike command by detecting a specific service installation

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (((LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/c%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%echo%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%\pipe\%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%%comspec%%')) OR (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%rundll32%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%.dll,a%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/p:%') OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '\\127.0.0.1\admin$\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Meterpreter or Cobalt Strike Getsystem Service Installation - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND (((LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/c%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%echo%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%\pipe\%') AND (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%cmd%' OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%%comspec%%')) OR (LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%rundll32%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%.dll,a%' AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%/p:%') OR LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '\\127.0.0.1\admin$\%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Meterpreter or Cobalt Strike Getsystem Service Installation - Security
